mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, user_nm AS userNm, pwd, user_email AS userEmail, user_status AS userStatus, role_id AS roleId FROM USERS WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS (user_id, user_nm, pwd, user_email, role_id, user_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userNm}, #{pwd}, #{userEmail}, 1, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.user_nm AS userNm, u.user_email AS userEmail, u.user_status AS userStatus, u.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName FROM USERS u JOIN ROLES r ON u.role_id = r.role_id ORDER BY u.user_id
SELECT role_id AS roleId, role_name AS roleName FROM ROLES ORDER BY role_id
